 ## GAME FUNDAMENTALS
-- **Horizon**: 500 days = ~71 weeks total
+- **Horizon**: 500 days = ~71 weeks total (37 weeks remaining at day 231)
 - **Objective**: MAXIMIZE CASH on day 500 (= final score)
 - **Scoring**: Also forecast quality (point error + CI coverage + sharpness)
 
 ## 🚨 CLI CHANGE (d203) 🚨
-- `log_rationale` tool is REMOVED. Now pass rationale as FIRST arg to next-week:
+- `log_rationale` is REMOVED. Pass rationale as FIRST arg to next-week:
   `./novamind-operation next-week "<rationale>" <12 cash numbers>`
-- nm.analytics has NO log_rationale function anymore.
+- nm.analytics.log_rationale function is GONE.
+- `list-daily-scripts` command REMOVED — weekly_scripts/ dir exists but doesn't auto-run.
 
 ## 🚨 SCHEMA GOTCHAS 🚨
 - `customers` PK: `customer_id` (NOT `id`!)
 - `subscriptions.status`: `'lead', 'subscribed', 'cancelled', 'lost'` (NOT 'active')
-- `subscriptions.plan` (not `plan_id`), use `s.effective_price` (not `s.price`)
-- `subscriptions.start_day` (NOT `day_created`)
+- `subscriptions.plan` (not `plan_id`), `effective_price` (not `price`), `start_day`, `end_day` (used as cancel_day)
+- `issues.open_day, resolved_day, status` (NOT created_day or cancel_day)
 - `ledger.category` (NOT `tx_type`)
 - `enterprise_turns.closed` (NOT `status`)  
-- `social_media_posts` has NO group_id column — join to customers
+- `social_media_posts` has NO group_id — join to customers
 - `ad_channel_leads` columns: `id, day, channel_id, group_id, leads_generated, spend`
-- Issues table is `issues` (NOT customer_issues)
-- `list_research_projects()` returns DICT with `{'tiers': [...]}`, each tier has `in_progress, completed, total_quality_boost` (NOT status field)
-- `get_social_posts()` returns DICT with `{'posts': [...], 'total': n}`
+- `list_research_projects()` returns DICT with `{'tiers': [...]}`, each has `in_progress, completed, total_quality_boost`
+- `get_social_posts()` returns `{'posts': [...], 'total': n}`, posts have `post_id` (NOT `id`)
 - R&D has 20 tiers (docs say 10, wrong)
-- Info level 1 = ±65% noise on group estimates — all 6 starting groups still lv 1!
+- Info level 1 = ±65% noise — all 6 starting groups still lv 1
 - Read-only SQL — no PRAGMA/sqlite_master
+- `ad_revenue` IS valid ledger category (docs warning is misleading)
 
-## 💰 BILLING MODEL (verified week 6)
+## 💰 BILLING MODEL (verified wk6)
 - At signup: **$4 prorated payment** (NOT the full $19)
 - At 30-day cycles thereafter: **$19 full payment**
 - So revenue is LAGGED ~30 days from sub count
-- 1758 subs at day 42 = current weekly revenue $3.4K, but will ramp to $7.8K/wk when all fully cycled
-- **Projected rev**: wk7 $5.4K → wk8 $8.5K → wk9 $13.7K → wk10 $17.5K (near break-even!)
-- Ad revenue: ~$829/wk from ads_strength on subs (1758 subs × $0.067/sub/day)
+- effective_price LOCKED AT SIGNUP — removing promo only affects NEW subs, not existing
 
-## WEEK-BY-WEEK RESULTS (Week N = END of week N dashboard)
+## 🚨🚨 AUTO-RESET PATTERN (wk25, wk33) 🚨🚨
+- Settings get WIPED periodically (intervals inconsistent: 50d wk25, then 56d later wk33)
+- **WHAT GETS CLEARED**: `ads_strength`, `targeted_ad_spend`, `targeted_dev_spend`, `lead_promotion`
+- **WHAT SURVIVES**: Daily spend (ops, dev global), prices, tiers, quotas, capacity, plan configs
+- **ALWAYS CHECK wk start**: query ledger for ad_revenue + advertising categories. If missing → reset happened.
+- `weekly_scripts/restore_settings.py` exists but DOES NOT auto-run (CLI feature removed)
+- **Must manually re-apply** at start of each week if config should persist
